title: IT'S DIGGING FOR ITS OWN PARTS
concept: The machine that mines its own parts: UAF's AI hunts Alaska's critical minerals
treatment: FUSED (writers-room panel, scorer-graded winner): 'It's Digging For Its Own Parts' (Explainer) crowned as the buildable spine; grafted the Dramatist's rusted-pickaxes and pencil-snap gags and the Comedian's still-hungry chest-socket button. Repainted copper/amethyst/citrine/lime for freshness, camera grammar vertical-descent/cross-section. GATE-0 REVISION: flow-critic (PRE) flagged a systemic say-it-show-it offset (every number drawn 4-12s off its spoken word) and both critics flagged the cargo-ship/Sullivan beat as off-spine; this board RETIMES every callout to land on its exact word (UAF+$15M on 'fifteen million', NSF on 'National Science Foundation', 1-of-12 on the map line, bedrock cross-section on 'bedrock', 56-of-60 wall on its own line, mineral names one-per-word), CUTS the cargo-ship/Sullivan beat (the China context moves to the caption/draft), differentiates the hero as a working DRILLER (new 'focused' machine emotion, copper body, drill-down arm) instead of the 07-16 grinning mascot, and makes the ore-chunk silhouette ghost-match into the empty chest socket before the label.

fingerprint.palette: amethyst-plum subsurface bedrock, copper-rose machine metal, citrine-gold ore and chip glow, phosphor-lime AI-search accent
fingerprint.metaphor: an AI machine drilling into Alaska's bedrock for the exact critical minerals that go into its own chip, learning the ground (and the funding) have real limits it cannot dig around

divergence_note: Diverges from 2026-07-14 (orbital-aerial, map-territory, blueprint-technical: an aerial blueprint of an UNBUILT data center) and 2026-07-16 (a ground-level characterized-object comedy: a reach-and-bury confrontation over the same Stak proposal) on every one of the fingerprint axes. This board goes UNDERGROUND: cross-section-cutaway pov and stacked-layers layout instead of aerial or map-territory; vertical-descent motion (a drill plunging down) instead of assemble-build or reach-then-bury; a copper DRILLING/CLAW prospecting machine with a working 'focused' face instead of a blue reaching/plug-hungry grinning one; an amethyst-plum subsurface world with copper machine-metal and citrine/lime glow instead of navy-ember-sage or silver-gunmetal-blueprint; and a completely different metaphor, an AI mining the exact minerals it is made of, rather than an AI begging for power it has not secured. Spatial signature (cross-section-cutaway, stacked-layers, vertical-descent) does not repeat any of the last four dispatches' signatures.

hook.frame1: a copper prospecting machine, its drill-head right arm plunged straight DOWN into the tundra (not the season's up-reaching plug), a working absorbed expression rather than a grin, citrine dust puffing off the spinning bit; the drill-down silhouette is unmistakable within 1s
hook.headline: AI IS DIGGING IN ALASKA
hook.loopback: the final beat pushes the camera back into this exact cold-open frame (drill still spinning, dust still puffing) so the machine appears to dig forever, one chest socket now lit but the rest still hollow

shots.centered: the copper machine's absorbed face and drill-head arm punching down into the ground, then a chip-shaped fleck glinting up
shots.means: opens the film: an AI machine physically digging into Alaska, and it is digging for the metals it is built from

hero.name: Prospecting Machine
hero.detail_note: copper-toned ink-outlined body, blinking LED status row, down-plunged drill-head arm, working 'focused' eyes and mouth, seamed chest panel with a faint ghost chip-slot

shots.centered: a UAF wordmark card and the '$15M YEAR ONE' starburst firing exactly on 'fifteen million dollars', then the NSF seal on its name
shots.means: the award, drawn on its words: UAF, $15M, NSF each appear as they are spoken

hero.name: Award Card (UAF + $15M + NSF)
hero.detail_note: UAF wordmark plate, a citrine starburst stat badge reading $15M YEAR ONE, an NSF seal stamp, the copper machine watching from below

shots.centered: the shrinking lime AI-circle converging on one pulsing dot as the VO says 'one of twelve engines, twenty states'
shots.means: the AI-narrows-the-search mechanism, drawn on the line that names the program's scale

hero.name: Alaska Map + AI Search-Circle
hero.detail_note: hand-inked Alaska landmass with scattered red possibility-dots, a dashed lime search-circle contracting to one dot, a '1 OF 12 ENGINES / 20 STATES' callout

shots.centered: the ground opening to a bedrock cross-section on 'bedrock', the 56-of-60 periodic wall igniting on its own line, then mineral names lighting one-per-word
shots.means: the underground is the data: bedrock, the 56/60 stat, and the mineral names each land on their exact words

hero.name: Bedrock Cross-Section + Periodic Wall
hero.detail_note: dashed cross-section ground with labeled gem-toned ore veins, a 56-of-60 periodic wall with individually-lit tiles, one tile a pencil that snaps its tip

shots.centered: the claw hauls one ore chunk, it cracks open to a glowing chip, and the chip ghost-matches into the machine's own empty chest socket
shots.means: lands the core irony as a picture: the ore IS the machine's missing part, shape-matched into its chest

hero.name: Ore-to-Chip + Chest Socket
hero.detail_note: comic crack-lines splitting rock to a citrine chip, the machine's chest panel hinged open on a dashed socket the chip silhouette-matches into, a MADE WITH label

shots.centered: the towering dashed lime $160M ghost model rising on its line, then a NOT AWARDED stamp as the solid $15M model holds steady
shots.means: draws the money caveat honestly: $160M is a contingent ghost, only the solid $15M is real

hero.name: $15M Solid Model vs $160M Ghost Model
hero.detail_note: a fully-inked small copper machine beside a 1.8x dashed lime ghost twin pulsing low-opacity, a NOT AWARDED stamp

shots.centered: the geologist's pickaxe bouncing off bare bedrock (DOINK), then the machine clicking one chip into its socket as the frame pulls back into the exact cold-open composition
shots.means: delivers the labor caveat (AI does not swing the pick) and buttons the loop: one part filled, the rest still hungry

hero.name: Machine (looped) + Geologist's Pickaxe
hero.detail_note: worker-outfit geologist mid-swing on bare rock with an UNPROVEN AT SCALE stamp, then the copper machine with one lit citrine chip socket and the rest still dashed and empty

beats.vo: An AI system is digging into Alaska's ground,
beats.shows: copper machine's absorbed 'focused' face and drill-head arm punching DOWN into citrine-lit ground; red boxed headline 'AI IS DIGGING IN ALASKA' snaps in at 1.0s
beats.means: opens on the hook: an AI machine physically digging, headline states the bold claim

draw.subject: copper-toned prospecting machine with a down-plunged drill arm
draw.action: drills straight down into the tundra, spraying citrine dust

choreo.reaction: machine's eyes tracking the hole, LEDs blinking in sequence
choreo.ambient: citrine dust motes drifting up, heat-shimmer rising off the copper body

beats.vo: hunting for the metals it is built from.
beats.shows: the drill lifts a small chip-shaped fleck that glints; a faint dashed ghost-chip outline pulses inside the machine's chest panel (foreshadowing 'built from')
beats.means: shows what the machine is hunting: the metals it is literally built from

draw.subject: a chip-shaped ore fleck and the machine's chest panel
draw.action: the fleck glints up from the bit as a ghost-chip outline pulses in the chest
draw.annotation: THE METALS IT IS BUILT FROM

choreo.primary: the fleck rising and catching the light
choreo.reaction: the chest ghost-chip outline pulsing in answer

beats.vo: The University of Alaska Fairbanks won fifteen million dollars
beats.shows: a UAF wordmark plate boots in; on 'fifteen million dollars' a citrine '$15M, YEAR ONE' starburst badge springs in and lands
beats.means: the winner and the number, drawn exactly on the words that name them

draw.subject: UAF wordmark plate and a $15M starburst badge
draw.action: the badge springs in and counts up to $15M as the words are said

choreo.primary: badge spring-in and count-up on the word
choreo.reaction: the copper machine below tips its head up toward the badge
choreo.ambient: UAF plate settling with a slight overshoot, LED flicker

beats.shows: an NSF seal stamps onto the frame on the words 'National Science Foundation'; the $15M badge settles beside it
beats.means: the funder, drawn on its own name

draw.subject: the NSF seal
draw.action: stamps down onto the award card as it is named

choreo.primary: the seal thudding down with an ink-settle
choreo.reaction: the $15M badge nudging aside to make room
choreo.ambient: faint dust still drifting from the machine below

beats.vo: One of twelve engines picked across twenty states,
beats.shows: cut to a hand-inked Alaska map with dozens of red possibility-dots; a dashed lime AI-circle sweeps and contracts; a '1 OF 12 ENGINES, 20 STATES' callout fires on the line
beats.means: the program's scale, drawn on the words that state it

draw.subject: Alaska map with a sweeping AI search-circle
draw.action: the dashed circle contracts pass by pass toward one pulsing dot

choreo.primary: search-circle radius shrinking across two sweep passes
choreo.reaction: the callout badge springing in on the spoken line
choreo.ambient: unlit red dots outside the circle dimming

beats.shows: the map's single dot drills DOWN and the ground opens into a dashed bedrock cross-section on the word 'bedrock', gem-toned ore veins beginning to glow
beats.means: the bedrock, drawn on the word 'bedrock' (fixes the prior orphan)

draw.subject: bedrock cross-section under the map dot
draw.action: the ground splits open to reveal glowing ore veins as 'bedrock' is said

choreo.primary: the ground-line sweeping open into a cross-section
choreo.reaction: ore veins beginning to ignite from the drilled dot
choreo.ambient: citrine glow bleeding up through the dashed ground-line

beats.vo: Fifty six of sixty critical minerals sit here:
beats.shows: the cross-section resolves into a periodic-table wall: 56 tiles ignite phosphor-lime with a staggered ding, 4 stay dark; a hand-drawn lime circle loops the 56 as the number is said; a pencil-tile writes a check then snaps its tip
beats.means: the signature stat, drawn as a countable wall exactly on its own line (the biggest say-it-show-it win)

draw.subject: periodic-table wall of element tiles
draw.action: 56 tiles ignite lime in a rapid stagger while 4 stay dark

choreo.primary: tiles lighting in a fast diagonal stagger
choreo.reaction: the pencil-tile writing a check-mark then snapping its tip
choreo.ambient: residual green glow flickering across the 4 unlit tiles

beats.vo: cobalt, graphite, gallium, nickel, rare earths.
beats.shows: on the veins, five mineral labels light up ONE PER WORD as they are spoken: COBALT, then GRAPHITE, then GALLIUM, then NICKEL, then RARE EARTHS
beats.means: each mineral name drawn on its own word (fixes the bare 'ORE HAULED')

draw.subject: the labeled ore veins
draw.action: each vein's label ignites in turn as its mineral is named
draw.annotation: COBALT / GRAPHITE / GALLIUM / NICKEL / RARE EARTHS

choreo.primary: labels igniting one-per-word down the veins
choreo.reaction: the machine's drill-eye tracking each vein as it lights

beats.vo: Crack one open, and inside is the same chip
beats.shows: cut to macro: the machine's claw hauls one ore chunk up; snap-zoom (SpeedLines + ImpactStar) as it cracks open along comic crack-lines to reveal a glowing citrine chip silhouette inside
beats.means: the reveal, drawn on 'the same chip': the ore contains a chip

draw.subject: a cracking ore chunk in the claw
draw.action: splits open to reveal a glowing chip silhouette on the word 'chip'

choreo.primary: crack-lines racing across the ore then bursting open
choreo.reaction: the machine's eyes going wide (shock) at the chip
choreo.ambient: amber spark-burst flaring behind the chip

beats.vo: the machine needs to keep thinking. It is mining itself.
beats.shows: the chip floats from the claw and its silhouette GHOST-MATCHES into the dashed empty socket on the machine's chest (the shape rhyme), then a 'MADE WITH: COBALT, GRAPHITE, GALLIUM' label snaps beside it
beats.means: draws the self-cannibalizing irony as a picture: the chip fits the machine's own empty socket

draw.subject: the chip and the machine's open chest socket
draw.action: the chip silhouette slots toward the identical empty socket as 'mining itself' is said

choreo.primary: chip silhouette drifting and aligning to the socket shape
choreo.reaction: machine's brows dropping from focus to worry
choreo.ambient: a hollow glow pulsing from inside the empty socket

beats.vo: Up to one hundred sixty million dollars is possible over ten years.
beats.shows: cut to a two-up: a towering 1.8x dashed lime GHOST machine model rises on 'one hundred sixty million', labeled 'UP TO $160M, OVER 10 YEARS', beside the small solid copper machine
beats.means: draws the money ceiling on its words: a big dashed maybe next to the small solid real

draw.subject: a giant dashed ghost machine model
draw.action: rises and pulses low-opacity as the $160M figure is spoken

choreo.primary: the ghost model rising and its dashed outline pulsing
choreo.reaction: the small solid model steady in its shadow
choreo.ambient: lime flecks drifting off the ghost's dashed edges

beats.vo: That part is not funded yet. Only fifteen million is real.
beats.shows: a red 'NOT AWARDED' stamp thuds across the ghost model on 'not funded yet'; the solid '$15M FUNDED' model holds rock-steady and lit as 'only fifteen million is real' is said; the ghost deflates
beats.means: the honest caveat: the ghost is stamped NOT AWARDED, only the solid $15M is real

draw.subject: the ghost model and the solid $15M model
draw.action: NOT AWARDED stamps over the ghost as it deflates; the solid model stays lit

choreo.primary: the NOT AWARDED stamp thudding down and the ghost sagging
choreo.ambient: torn dashed flecks fluttering off the deflating ghost

beats.vo: Geologists still have to swing the pick.
beats.shows: cut wide: a worker-outfit geologist swings a real pickaxe at bare bedrock, a comic DOINK bounce with a vibration squiggle up the arm; an 'UNPROVEN AT SCALE' stamp lands
beats.means: the labor caveat drawn: AI narrows the search, a human still swings, and can still find nothing

draw.subject: the geologist swinging a pickaxe
draw.action: strikes bare bedrock and bounces off with nothing found

choreo.reaction: a vibration squiggle traveling up the arm to a wince
choreo.ambient: a puff of rock dust at the impact point

beats.vo: Alaska found the flashlight. It has not found the minerals yet.
beats.shows: the machine clicks the citrine chip into ONE chest socket, which lights, while the other sockets stay dashed and empty and its stomach growls; camera slow-pushes back into the exact cold-open composition (drill spinning, citrine dust); hard cut to black on the drill's downbeat
beats.means: buttons the caveat (partial progress only) and closes the loop back to the opening image

draw.subject: the same copper machine from the cold open
draw.action: clicks one chip home, its other sockets still empty, then resumes drilling as the frame returns to the opening shot
draw.annotation: FOUND THE FLASHLIGHT, NOT THE MINERALS. YET.

choreo.primary: the chip locking into one socket with a flash, then the camera pulling back to the identical cold-open framing
choreo.reaction: the machine glancing at its still-empty sockets before resuming the drill
choreo.ambient: citrine dust puffing exactly as at frame zero, loop-perfect
